CheckTitle: Ensure MFA is required for administrative roles via Conditional Access
Description: Verifies that at least one enabled Conditional Access policy enforces MFA for users in privileged directory roles (Global Administrator, Exchange Administrator, SharePoint Administrator, etc.).
Risk: Admin accounts are high-value targets. Without a dedicated MFA policy scoped to directory roles, compromised admin credentials grant full tenant control. Even if a global MFA policy exists, it may have exclusions that admins fall through.

Remediation.Recommendation: Create a Conditional Access policy targeting directory roles (e.g. Global Admin, Privileged Role Admin, Exchange Admin) with All Cloud Apps scope and MFA or authentication strength grant control.
